home.description:
Designing product experiences
in fintech, b2b and consumer apps.
From research to interface.
home.about_text: I work at the intersection of research, strategy and interface. I believe good design is invisible — it just works.

about.title: About
about.bio_1: Product UX/UI designer focused on fintech and b2b products. I work from research to final interface.
about.bio_2: Approach: understand the problem first, then design the solution. Not the other way around.
